markdown:
Done. The inbox comment persisted and `recommendation.md` is written; both will be picked up by the run's ground-integration commit as in prior passes.

## Summary

Fifth opening-Ground pass for run 0013 (T9, Jacobian⇄Albanese glue). No Horizon has run yet, so there is no diff to reconcile. I did a drift-check of the T9 port state and confirmed it is unchanged and honest, refreshed the orientation note, and updated the human-facing tracker.

## Progress
- `recommendation.md` (0009-ground): written — concise T9 orientation pointing at `I-0112`, the port files, the `descentThroughBirationalSigma` glue, and Milne 3.3 substep-4b.
- `SubProjects/Albanese/.../PolePurity.lean`, `SmoothPrimeRegularity.lean`, `StandardSmoothDimension.lean`: re-confirmed sorry-free, cheat-clean, present only in SUB — matches `I-0112`.
- `MainProjects/.../Albanese/`: the three support files still absent; port still pending. No AJC Lean changed.
- Ledger: only ground-integration commits + one `\leanok` fix since baseline — confirms zero Horizon activity.
- `I-0115`: commented to record the 5th pass and reinforce the "launch a Horizon run" signal to the human.

## Issues
- **Process stall:** five consecutive opening-Ground passes, zero Horizon sessions on T9 — the orchestrator is not launching Horizon for `AJC.albanese`. Flagged (updated `I-0115`); Ground cannot start work.
- Open memory items sit at ~13 (soft target ~10), but all are live technical recipes (T9/T12/FBC/tangent cones); archiving any would drop durable context Horizon needs, so I left them.
- No full AJC `lake build` run this session (nothing changed to verify); raw `grep sorry` over the T9 files is prose-dominated and unreliable — real counts remain those in `I-0112`.
- `I-0114` (duplicate `\label{thm:albanese_universal_property}`) still open, awaiting a human design decision.

## Why I stopped
Task not complete: T9 requires a Horizon formalization run, which Ground cannot launch. As opening Ground with no prior Horizon diff, my reconcile scope is empty until code changes; orientation and inbox upkeep are done.

## Next
- Human: launch a Horizon run on the leg (`horizon run AJC.albanese`) — the port is fully scoped in `I-0112`.
- After a Horizon diff exists: reconcile blueprint/DAG, kernel-verify (`#print axioms`) the ported bodies, and resolve `I-0114`.
recommendation:
# Orientation — Run 0013, T9 (Jacobian⇄Albanese endgame glue)

- Useful context: memory `I-0112` (+ comment `C-0001`) is the authoritative T9 map — the `Albanese` subproject leads AJC on the rational-map-extension leg. This is the **fifth** opening-Ground pass; the ledger since baseline holds only ground-integration commits plus one blueprint `\leanok` fix (`02470752`), so no Horizon has run and no AJC Lean/blueprint changed. The port state is unchanged and re-verified this session.

- Relevant files: the port is self-contained, `SubProjects/Albanese/AlgebraicJacobian/Albanese/` → `MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/AlgebraicJacobian/Albanese/`. Confirmed on disk this session: `PolePurity.lean`, `SmoothPrimeRegularity.lean`, `StandardSmoothDimension.lean` exist only in SUB, are sorry-free and cheat-clean (import `Mathlib` + AJC-present `AuslanderBuchsbaum`/`CoheightBridge`). SUB `CodimOneExtension.lean`/`Thm32RationalMapExtension.lean` carry closed bodies AJC lacks. Real-sorry counts live in `I-0112`; a raw `grep sorry` over these files is dominated by prose mentions and misranks SUB above AJC.

- Assembly note: `AlbaneseUP.lean` (AJC) imports `Mathlib` + `AlgebraicJacobian.Genus`, so `descentThroughBirationalSigma` `sorry`s the extension step rather than consuming `thm:rational_map_to_av_extends` (Thm32). Porting the three support files + swapping the SUB bodies is preparatory; the substantive glue is wiring the Thm32 import and applying the extension theorem inside `descentThroughBirationalSigma`. `bundle := sorry` (~line 183) is representability-gated, out of T9 scope. Deep remainder on the extension leg is Milne 3.3 substep-4b (`indeterminacy_pure_codim_one_into_grpScheme`, diagonal-intersection bound).

- Consistency / recipes: `WeilDivisor.lean`'s `PrimeDivisor`/`RationalMap.order` substrate is a live dependency of the codim-1 leg (`I-0106`), not dead genus-0 weight. Neighbouring memory: `I-0065` (honest Milne 3.1/3.3 chain; the FALSE `codimOneFree ⇒ extension` — never re-add), `I-0061`/`I-0082` (tangentSpaceIso path). Blueprint `I-0114` tracks the duplicate `\label{thm:albanese_universal_property}` across `Albanese_AlbaneseUP.tex:99` and `Jacobian.tex:490` (open to human). Kernel-verify (`#print axioms`) ported bodies on merge; no full AJC `lake build` was run this session.
